sidebar.tip1: Use curly braces like {author} in the Title Pattern to auto-fill project names.
sidebar.tip2: Add "Custom" as an option in Dropdowns to let users type their own value.
sidebar.tip3: Toggle Hidden on fields you want to pre-fill logically but hide from users (advanced).

home.badge: v1.1 with AI is now live
home.title: Orchestrate Operations.
home.subtitle: Streamline your business with executable protocols, SaaS lifecycle management, and AI-driven workflows. From SOP to Delivery, automated.

features.title: Supercharge your workflow
features.subtitle: Everything you need to ship projects faster, all in one place.

standardized.title: SOP as Code
standardized.desc: Transform static documents into executable protocols. Ensure every task is performed to your exact standards.

dependencies.title: Smart Guardrails
dependencies.desc: Sequential workflows with auto-unlocking tasks. Prevent errors by ensuring prerequisites are always met.

parallel.title: Visual Command Center
parallel.desc: Track every project's progress in real-time. Identify bottlenecks before they impact your delivery.

automated.title: AI-Powered Generation
automated.desc: Draft complex protocols in seconds using AI. Let the system suggest the best workflow for your needs.

sync.title: SaaS & License Hub
sync.desc: Manage SaaS products, external webhooks, and license lifecycles in one unified dashboard.

audit.title: Developer Ready
audit.desc: Exportable documentation, webhook integrations, and protocol portability with JSON export/import.

deployment.title: Flexible Deployment
deployment.subtitle: Choose the model that fits your organization's security and policy requirements.

community.title: Open Source Edition
community.desc: Community-driven and free to use. Host it yourself and contribute to the evolution of automated operations.

saas.title: Managed SaaS
saas.desc: Scale instantly without thinking about infrastructure. We handle updates, backups, and security.

enterprise.title: Setup Service
enterprise.desc: Need it on your own VPS or Private Cloud? Our team provides professional setup and configuration services.

story.title: Why We Built Time Work?
story.content: Many companies complained to Crediblemark that the software they used didn't truly fit their company's climate and reality. Every corporate culture is unique, and rigid solutions often hinder progress. However, one thing is certain: every line of task must be completed efficiently. That's why we prioritize protocol flexibility that can be tailored to your team's unique way of working.

define.title: 1. Input Project
define.desc: Start a project from a protocol template.

execute.title: 2. Execute
execute.desc: Your team works on tasks according to the protocol order.

automate.title: 3. Deliver
automate.desc: System ensures quality gatekeepers are passed at every stage.

free.a: Yes, Time Work is open source (MIT). You can host it yourself for free, or use our managed SaaS for a worry-free experience.

team.a: Absolutely. You can invite unlimited team members to your organization.

limit.a: Project limits depend on your organization plan.

footer.desc: The new standard for team operations.
